steps.t: Zudramdân can be found in Elderslade. You should talk to Náth at Zudramdân.
The rally banner of Gabil'akkâ can be found at Zudramdân in Elderslade. You should rally for war at the banner of Gabil'akkâ.
Agátur the Boastful, Náth, and Rúzat have all joined the War of Three Peaks. You should talk to Agátur the Boastful, Náth, and Rúzat at Zarkul-sulûn.
Agátur the Boastful can be found at Zarkul-sulûn. You should talk to Agátur the Boastful at Zarkul-sulûn.
Stálskeg Ironbeard can be found at Annâk-khurfu. You should talk to Stálskeg Ironbeard to continue assisting the Gabil'akkâ.
